name: contorra-for-ai
description: Contorra internal plugins for AI-assisted work: Events tracker roles (PM / dev / designer / QA) and shared base.

plugins.name: events-tracker-shared
plugins.description: Map / ontology / invariants / MCP-tool guide for the Events tracker in Linear. Auto-loaded as a dependency of any events-tracker-* role plugin.

plugins.name: events-tracker-pm
plugins.description: PM / tracker-owner role for the Events tracker — Project pair creation, Triage sweep, cycle planning.

plugins.name: events-tracker-designer
plugins.description: Designer role for the Events tracker — self-pull Design Issues, submit for dev review, respond to bounces, review impl on staging in Design Review.

plugins.name: events-tracker-dev
plugins.description: Developer role for the Events tracker — pick up Impl Issues, walk statuses to staging, hand off to Design Review / QA, respond to bounces, review designs for implementability.

plugins.name: events-tracker-qa
plugins.description: QA role for the Events tracker — pick up Impl Issues in QA on staging, approve to Done (release gate) or reject with checklist, file sub-issue bugs.
